Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}I believed in him for so long.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Remember what I told you at the hospital?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}How my dad died when I was little?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}You understand now, right? He died in that incident.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Nobody knew the truth, so there were all sorts of rumors.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Because he was in charge of the research team, people were really mean to me and my mom.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}We even had to move a few times.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Sorry, I'd rather not talk about it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}But all this time, I kept telling myself it wasn't his fault.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I loved him a lot, and I believed he'd never do anything wrong.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_4_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}I received a letter back in spring. It was from him, written ten years ago.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}It cracked me up 'cause, even though he said, "To my family," it was more or less all about me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}And that only made me believe in him more.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}When I found out I had a special power, I thought it was fate.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}I was scared, but I thought if I cooperated with the Kirijo Group, I might find out what really happened.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}That's why I agreed to fight using my Persona.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}But now... Now I can see it was all for nothing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}You're just trying to make me feel better.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}I tried so hard to fight my fear, and this is what I get.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}And, you know... I think maybe I was jealous too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}I mean, after all that's happened, why does Kirijo-senpai's father get to live?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Wow, I don't know how you do it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}You're always so calm. Nothing ever fazes you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Did you really think I could just be cheered up so easily?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}I can barely make sense of all of this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Just tell me, what am I supposed to do now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}You really are something else.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}...Sorry for acting like this. I know you've lost your parents too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}I'll be all right. I'm used to dealing with stressful situations.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}Anyway, thanks for listening.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}Lemme guess. Senpai asked you to bring me back, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari is laughing, though her[n]eyes are red from all the crying...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}Haha, aren't you a smooth talker.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari is laughing, though her[n]eyes are red from all the crying...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}Yeesh, what's takin' you guys so long? Everybody was getting worried.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}It's almost the Dark Hour, so we gotta head back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}No, I-I just almost forgot. It doesn't matter where you are when the Dark Hour comes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}C'mon, that's common sense! Even I remembered that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}You know, I've been thinking lately.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}Once you awaken to the power of Persona, you remember everything that happens during the Dark Hour.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 62 0 0}In exchange for power, you can no longer look away from the things you don't want to see.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 63 0 0}We can't escape reality, can we?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}I guess we've just gotta stay strong, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 67 0 0}Alright then! Let's head on back![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It feels like I'm being watched again...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to head back anyway.[n]{f 1 1}
